content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

**1. What is the Current Market Regime?**
RISK-ON: low volatility (Vol: 21.8%) with mixed breadth (3/8 sectors positive), supporting selective risk-taking while participation remains narrow.

**2. Which sectors are leading?**
Technology & Telecom leading via KONTR (1W: +29.43% | 1M: -41.15%) RECOVERY and TCELL (1W: +0.74% | 1M: +0.74%) ABOVE TREND; Energy & Chemicals led by TUPRS (1W: +13.41% | 1M: +8.04%) ABOVE TREND and TRALT (1W: +11.97% | 1M: +13.38%) ABOVE TREND; Transportation led by THYAO (1W: +6.83% | 1M: +17.16%) ABOVE TREND.

**3. Which sectors are lagging?**
Banking & Finance showing weakness with AKBNK (1W: -4.42% | 1M: +10.01%) CORRECTION and YKBNK (1W: -6.33% | 1M: +7.61%) CORRECTION; Holding & Investment lagging via SAHOL (1W: -4.82% | 1M: +1.42%) CORRECTION; Retail, Heavy Industry and Construction are also underperforming overall.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

**4. Top Performing Stocks?**
KONTR (1W: +29.43% | 1M: -41.15%) RECOVERY; TUPRS (1W: +13.41% | 1M: +8.04%) ABOVE TREND; TRALT (1W: +11.97% | 1M: +13.38%) ABOVE TREND; ASELS (1W: +11.01% | 1M: +4.08%) ABOVE TREND; TRMET (1W: +9.01% | 1M: +0.00%) NEUTRAL.

**5. Worst Performing Stocks?**
TTKOM (1W: -3.42% | 1M: -7.78%) BELOW TREND; TAVHL (1W: -3.54% | 1M: +7.19%) CORRECTION; AKBNK (1W: -4.42% | 1M: +10.01%) CORRECTION; SAHOL (1W: -4.82% | 1M: +1.42%) CORRECTION; ALARK (1W: -5.20% | 1M: +0.89%) CORRECTION.

**6. Momentum Stocks?**
KONTR (1W: +29.43% | 1M: -41.15%) RECOVERY; TUPRS (1W: +13.41% | 1M: +8.04%) ABOVE TREND; TRALT (1W: +11.97% | 1M: +13.38%) ABOVE TREND; ASELS (1W: +11.01% | 1M: +4.08%) ABOVE TREND; TRMET (1W: +9.01% | 1M: +0.00%) NEUTRAL.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

**7. Banking Sector Outlook?**
Cautious: AKBNK (1W: -4.42% | 1M: +10.01%) CORRECTION, GARAN (1W: -2.61% | 1M: +3.94%) CORRECTION, ISCTR (1W: -2.43% | 1M: +4.48%) CORRECTION, YKBNK (1W: -6.33% | 1M: +7.61%) CORRECTION — look for stabilization but avoid adding size until breadth widens.

**8. Industrial Sector Outlook?**
Mixed: EREGL (1W: +1.93% | 1M: +5.74%) ABOVE TREND and ASELS (1W: +11.01% | 1M: +4.08%) ABOVE TREND provide leadership while KRDMD (1W: -5.68% | 1M: -3.74%) BELOW TREND, VESTL (1W: -5.20% | 1M: -4.16%) BELOW TREND and FROTO (1W: -1.83% | 1M: -4.71%) BELOW TREND show intra-sector dispersion.

**9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?**
Selective bullish: TUPRS (1W: +13.41% | 1M: +8.04%) ABOVE TREND, TRALT (1W: +11.97% | 1M: +13.38%) ABOVE TREND and TRMET (1W: +9.01% | 1M: +0.00%) NEUTRAL; watch HEKTS (1W: -5.45% | 1M: -26.42%) BELOW TREND and SASA (1W: -5.71% | 1M: -10.81%) BELOW TREND for downside risk.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

**10. Portfolio Recommendation?**
Risk-on but narrow: overweight selective leaders in Technology & Telecom, Energy and Transportation (TUPRS, TRALT, THYAO, ASELS), trim exposure to weak breadth sectors (Banks, Holdings, select Industrials) and keep cash ready for volatility spikes.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

**11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?**
KONTR (1W: +29.43% | 1M: -41.15%) RECOVERY for follow-through, TUPRS (1W: +13.41% | 1M: +8.04%) ABOVE TREND on energy flows, ASELS (1W: +11.01% | 1M: +4.08%) ABOVE TREND on defense flows, THYAO (1W: +6.83% | 1M: +17.16%) ABOVE TREND on travel demand.

**12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?**
Technology & Telecom for momentum reversals, Energy & Chemicals for commodity-driven moves, Transportation for cyclical recovery confirmation.

**13. Key Levels & Triggers?**
Monitor XU100 momentum for continuation above recent highs (breakout confirms RISK-ON) and support at the 20-day moving average; key catalysts: local CPI/CBRT commentary, global risk appetite, oil prices and corporate earnings surprises.

## EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
Low-volatility RISK-ON regime with participation concentrated in Technology, Energy and Transportation; breadth remains narrow (3/8), so favor high-conviction, liquid leaders (TUPRS, TRALT, ASELS, THYAO) and avoid broad re-risk into banks and lagging industrials until breadth widens or catalysts materialize.
